title: Tapestry: Luxury Goods Firm Is Cheap Ahead Of Earnings, Bullish Chart
text: The Discretionary sector has surged off its June low while China has endured losses recently. One accessories firm, priced inexpensively, is exposed to both key areas of the stock market.

title: Why Tapestry Stock May Struggle to Meet Expectations
text: Tapestry Inc (NYSE:TPR) is up 0.3% to trade at $34.03 at last check.
